I live in Canada and love sharing easy raw vegan snacks and desserts that are always date-free and allergy-friendly. This blog started as a simple hobby in 2021 and has now become my favorite way to connect with people who enjoy wholesome, plant-based treats. My recipes are simple, flexible, and made to bring more joy and ease into your kitchen.
